summary: Teams (Rep-to-Manager Assignment) feature fully tested and verified. Backend APIs working correctly: team-stats, managers, reps, assign-manager, bulk-assign-manager. Frontend TeamsPage working with two-panel layout, assign modal, bulk selection bar, and filters. Fixed 2 bugs during testing: AuditLog field mismatch and route ordering issue.
passed_tests: GET /api/admin/users/team-stats returns totalManagers, totalReps, unassignedReps (200 OK)
GET /api/admin/users/managers returns managers with rep_count (200 OK)
GET /api/admin/users/reps returns reps with manager_name (200 OK)
GET /api/admin/users/reps?manager_id={id} filters by manager (200 OK)
GET /api/admin/users/reps?unassigned=true returns only unassigned reps (200 OK)
PATCH /api/admin/users/:repId/assign-manager assigns manager correctly (200 OK)
PATCH /api/admin/users/:repId/assign-manager unassigns manager with null (200 OK)
PATCH /api/admin/users/bulk-assign-manager bulk assigns manager (200 OK)
PATCH /api/admin/users/bulk-assign-manager bulk unassigns with null manager_id (200 OK)
Invalid rep_id returns 404
Invalid manager_id returns 404
Empty rep_ids array returns 400
Authorization required for all endpoints (401)
Manager role forbidden for admin endpoints (403)
Stats match actual managers/reps counts
Manager rep_count matches assigned reps
Frontend: Teams page loads with stats cards
Frontend: Two-panel layout (Managers left, Reps right)
Frontend: Assign Manager modal opens with rep info
Frontend: Manager dropdown shows all managers
Frontend: Save Assignment updates rep and shows toast
Frontend: Bulk selection bar appears when reps selected
Frontend: Bulk assign/unassign works correctly
Frontend: Manager filter shows 'Reps under {name}'
Frontend: All/Assigned/Unassigned tabs filter correctly
Audit logs created for all assignments (single and bulk)

bugs_fixed_during_testing.root_cause: admin.js used incorrect field names (audit_id, entity_type, entity_id, details) instead of correct model fields (log_id, object_type, object_id, old_value/new_value)
bugs_fixed_during_testing.fix: Updated admin.js to use correct AuditLog model field names

bugs_fixed_during_testing.root_cause: Route ordering issue - /users/:userId was defined before /users/bulk-assign-manager, so Express matched 'bulk-assign-manager' as a userId parameter

critical_code_review_comments: Route ordering is critical in Express - specific routes must come before parameterized routes
AuditLog model field names should be documented to prevent future mismatches
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - tested with existing users (Manager User, Sales Rep, ruhith)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Teams page fully working. 2 reps currently assigned to Manager User. Audit logs are being generated for all assignment operations. Bulk assign/unassign working correctly.

mocked_integrations.stripe: MOCKED - Stripe payments in mock mode
mocked_integrations.gohighlevel: MOCKED - GoHighLevel notifications in mock mode

backend_apis.reps_list: Returns reps with manager_name enrichment, supports manager_id and unassigned filters
backend_apis.bulk_assign: Bulk updates multiple reps, creates audit logs for each

frontend_ui.stats_cards: Shows Total Managers, Total Reps, Unassigned Reps with icons
frontend_ui.two_panel_layout: Managers on left, Reps on right
frontend_ui.manager_filter: Click manager to filter reps, shows 'Reps under {name}'
frontend_ui.search: Manager and rep search inputs present
frontend_ui.assign_modal: Shows rep info, manager dropdown, Save/Cancel buttons
frontend_ui.bulk_action_bar: Appears when reps selected, shows count and manager dropdown
